requirement.description: When a gear shift operation starts or completes, the transmission controller shall immediately indicate the shift-in-progress status to the gateway ECU.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify flag assertions at shift start.
Verify flag de-assertion at shift completion.
Verify signal toggles during sequential shifts.
test_cases.expected_result: TCM_Shift_In_Progress toggles 1 -> 0 for each shift cycle

test_cases.test_objective: Verify signal remains 0 in steady state (Negative Test).

test_steps: Monitor all frames during shift duration
test_cases.expected_result: No dropouts; Bit 4 remains 1 throughout shift

test_cases.test_objective: Verify zero latency de-assertion at shift completion (Timing).
test_steps: Identify first CAN frame after shift completion
